name: portfolio-aio
description: Dev-tooling manifest for the AI-Driven PM Portfolio. The published site is dependency-free Vanilla JS (Boring Technology); these are CI/dev tools only (lint, CSS lint, E2E). No runtime dependencies. Application code imports nothing from here.

scripts.lint: eslint main.js error-suppressor.js karte-init.js theme-init.js aio-guard.js sw.js --no-eslintrc --config .eslintrc.json --env browser --env es2022
scripts.lint:js: node --check main.js && node --check sw.js && node --check aio-guard.js && node --check error-suppressor.js && node --check theme-init.js && node --check karte-init.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint:css && npm run lint && npm run lint:js
